rationale: The two papers are tightly aligned in topic: the citing paper models cross-channel sales effects of traditional, online display, and paid search, while the cited paper estimates relative effectiveness/elasticities across ten media channels (including display and sponsored search) with retail purchase outcomes. The citing note explicitly frames its contribution as extending prior multichannel advertising research, making this cited study a plausible direct benchmark/foundation rather than a generic mention; the DOI match (10.1509/jmr.12.0241) confirms an exact reference.
